parameters.query:
INSERT INTO app.learning_materials (chat_id, url, title, content, summary_json, difficulty)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.chat_id }},
  '{{ $json.url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.summary_json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.difficulty }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (chat_id, url) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  summary_json = EXCLUDED.summary_json,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty,
  added_at = now()
RETURNING id, chat_id, url, title, summary_json, difficulty;
SELECT id, title, difficulty FROM app.learning_materials WHERE chat_id = {{ $json.message.chat.id }} ORDER BY added_at DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT m.id AS material_id, m.chat_id, m.title, m.content, m.summary_json, m.difficulty FROM app.learning_materials m WHERE m.id = {{ Number(($json.callback_query.data || '').split(':')[1]) }};

INSERT INTO app.quizzes (material_id, chat_id, questions, started_at)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.material_id }},
  {{ $json.chat_id }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ questions: $json.questions }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  now()
)
RETURNING id, material_id, chat_id, questions;
SELECT id, material_id, chat_id, questions, started_at, finished_at FROM app.quizzes WHERE id = {{ $json.quiz_id }};

WITH agg AS (
  SELECT quiz_id,
         ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*))::INT AS score_pct
  FROM app.quiz_answers
  WHERE quiz_id = {{ $('poll_ans: validate').isExecuted ? $('poll_ans: validate').item.json.quiz_id : $('ans: validate').item.json.quiz_id }}
  GROUP BY quiz_id
)
UPDATE app.quizzes q
SET finished_at = now(), score_pct = agg.score_pct
FROM agg
WHERE q.id = agg.quiz_id
RETURNING q.id, q.score_pct;

SELECT materials_count, quizzes_taken, COALESCE(avg_score_pct, 0) AS avg_score_pct, last_quiz_at, advanced_materials, intermediate_materials, beginner_materials FROM app.v_user_stats WHERE chat_id = {{ $json.message.chat.id }};

parameters.text:
рџ¤” I don't recognise that command.

Try: /start, /learn <url>, /quiz, /stats

parameters.jsCode:
// Build localized /start welcome message
const tgLang = $('Telegram Trigger1').item.json.message?.from?.language_code || 'en';
const ru = tgLang.startsWith('ru');
const chatId = $('Telegram Trigger1').item.json.message.chat.id;

const text = ru
  ? `👋 *Добро пожаловать в Senior Interview Coach!*

Я AI-бот для подготовки к senior backend интервью — построен на n8n + Claude (Opus 4.7 Teacher, Haiku 4.5 Examiner).

*Что я умею:*

📚 \`/learn [URL]\` — отправь URL статьи / документации / блог-поста → я извлеку контент и сделаю структурированное саммари (5-7 ключевых пунктов + основные концепции + уровень сложности), откалиброванное под senior-планку.

🎯 \`/quiz\` — выбери материал из своих сохранённых → я сгенерирую 5 вопросов senior-уровня с интеллектуальной валидацией ответов и объяснениями.

📊 \`/stats\` — посмотри свой learning-дашборд (материалы, пройденные квизы, средний балл) + кнопка для открытия Mini App с графиками.

🌐 \`/lang\` — переключи язык бота (English / Русский).

🔍 \`@seniorprepcoach_bot <запрос>\` — поиск по своим материалам из любого чата (inline mode).

*Попробуй прямо сейчас:*
\`/learn https://martinfowler.com/articles/microservices.html\``
  : `👋 *Welcome to Senior Interview Coach!*

I'm an AI-powered learning bot for senior backend interview prep — built on n8n + Claude (Opus 4.7 Teacher, Haiku 4.5 Examiner).

*What I can do:*

📚 \`/learn [URL]\` — submit any article / docs / blog post URL → I'll extract the content and produce a structured summary (5-7 key points + main concepts + difficulty) calibrated to the senior backend bar.

🎯 \`/quiz\` — pick from your saved materials → I'll generate 5 senior-level multiple-choice questions with intelligent answer validation and explanations.

📊 \`/stats\` — see your learning dashboard (materials, quizzes taken, average score) + Mini App with charts.

🌐 \`/lang\` — switch bot language (English / Русский).

🔍 \`@seniorprepcoach_bot <query>\` — search your materials inline from any chat.

*Try me right now:*
\`/learn https://martinfowler.com/articles/microservices.html\``;

const body_json = JSON.stringify({ chat_id: chatId, text, parse_mode: 'Markdown' });
return [{ json: { chat_id: chatId, body_json } }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO app.quiz_polls (poll_id, quiz_id, chat_id, question_id, question_idx, correct_option_id)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.poll_id.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.quiz_id }},
  {{ $json.chat_id }},
  '{{ $json.question_id.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.question_idx }},
  {{ $json.correct_option_id }}
)
ON CONFLICT (poll_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING poll_id;

SELECT qp.quiz_id, qp.chat_id, qp.question_id, qp.question_idx,
       qp.correct_option_id, q.questions
FROM app.quiz_polls qp
JOIN app.quizzes q ON q.id = qp.quiz_id
WHERE qp.poll_id = '{{ $json.poll_id.replace(/'/g, "''") }}';

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(v.materials_count, 0) AS materials_count,
  COALESCE(v.quizzes_taken, 0) AS quizzes_taken,
  COALESCE(v.avg_score_pct, 0) AS avg_score_pct,
  COALESCE(v.beginner_materials, 0) AS beginner_materials,
  COALESCE(v.intermediate_materials, 0) AS intermediate_materials,
  COALESCE(v.advanced_materials, 0) AS advanced_materials,
  v.last_quiz_at,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json) FROM (
    SELECT id, title, difficulty,
           to_char(added_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC','YYYY-MM-DD') AS added_at,
           (SELECT MAX(score_pct) FROM app.quizzes q WHERE q.material_id = m.id AND q.finished_at IS NOT NULL) AS best_score
    FROM app.learning_materials m
    WHERE m.chat_id = {{ Number($json.query.chat_id) }}
    ORDER BY added_at DESC LIMIT 20
  ) t) AS materials,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t) ORDER BY t.finished_at), '[]'::json) FROM (
    SELECT q.id, q.score_pct,
           to_char(q.finished_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS finished_at,
           m.title, m.difficulty
    FROM app.quizzes q JOIN app.learning_materials m ON m.id = q.material_id
    WHERE q.chat_id = {{ Number($json.query.chat_id) }} AND q.finished_at IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY q.finished_at DESC LIMIT 20
  ) t) AS quizzes,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json) FROM (
    SELECT to_char(date_trunc('day', finished_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day,
           COUNT(*)::INT AS cnt,
           ROUND(AVG(score_pct))::INT AS avg_pct
    FROM app.quizzes
    WHERE chat_id = {{ Number($json.query.chat_id) }}
      AND finished_at IS NOT NULL
      AND finished_at > now() - interval '28 days'
    GROUP BY 1
  ) t) AS activity,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE score_pct = 100)::INT FROM app.quizzes WHERE chat_id = {{ Number($json.query.chat_id) }}) AS perfect_quizzes,
  (SELECT MAX(score_pct) FROM app.quizzes WHERE chat_id = {{ Number($json.query.chat_id) }} AND finished_at IS NOT NULL) AS best_score
FROM (SELECT 1) dummy
LEFT JOIN app.v_user_stats v ON v.chat_id = {{ Number($json.query.chat_id) }};

SELECT id, title, difficulty,
       LEFT(COALESCE((summary_json->>'key_points')::text, ''), 120) AS preview
FROM app.learning_materials
WHERE chat_id = {{ $json.inline_query.from.id }}
  AND title ILIKE '%{{ ($json.inline_query.query || '').replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/%/g, '').replace(/[\\]/g,'') }}%'
ORDER BY added_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

INSERT INTO app.user_state (chat_id, lang)
VALUES ({{ $json.chat_id }}, '{{ $json.lang }}')
ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET lang = EXCLUDED.lang
RETURNING chat_id, lang;

INSERT INTO app.quiz_pool (material_id, lang, questions, generation_model)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.material_id }},
  '{{ $json.lang.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.questions).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ ($json.generation_model || 'unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
RETURNING id, material_id, lang;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ material_id: $('pool: pg load material').item.json.material_id, lang: $('pool: webhook /pool-refill').item.json.body.lang || 'en' }) }}
